meaning: vi.跋涉vt.涉水,费力行走n.跋涉,可涉水而过的地方
examples: Wade was a hearty, athletic sort of guy.
Wade stuck the cigarette between his lips.
Wade placed his chilled hands on the radiator and warmed them.
Wade allows late-term abortions after 24 weeks only when a woman's life is danger.
On 27 April, Coats and Wade told Parker and Smith they could leave the flat.
